creator: t6sn7gt@aim.com
text:
Environment: This is a machine that has no problems with networking.  Not only does Windows and every flavor of Linux work just fine, but FreeBDS 7.3 and 8.2 also install and run fine.

Network:  Ethernet is on nfe1

When I try to install 9.0 (using any media: dvd, cd and even PC-BSD), they all fail when trying to acquire a DHCP lease.  The system simply hangs and the install can't proceed.

Fix: 

None
How-To-Repeat: Every time, the installation hangs.
